item.dc:creator: Gretchen Morgenson
item.description: In recent years, mobile home properties have become less affordable as an influx of large companies have bought up the parks and raised rents and fees.

media:content.media:text: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.
media:content.media:description: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Black mold and water damage have been found throughout Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich's home.
media:content.media:description: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Buck Island offered to sell the dilapidated unit to Brown for $1,000.
media:content.media:description: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.
media:content.media:description: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.

media:content.media:text: A cat sniffs in the corner of the home of Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich.
media:content.media:description: Aliea Brown and Mason Obradovich at their home in Robinsonville, Miss.

item.title: Bugs and black mold: What some mobile home park residents see after investors buy in

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
Allie Canal
item.description: Consumers and U.S. workers are feeling the pinch of a wage growth rate that lags behind the rate of inflation.

media:content.media:text: Local Weather U.S.
media:content.media:description: A lightning bolt strikes the night sky above a Toot'n Totum gas station and convenience store on June 6, 2026 in Amarillo, Texas.

item.title: Inflation jumps to 4.2%, the highest since early 2023

item.description: The United States announced it retaliated to Iran’s downing of a U.S. Army Apache helicopter by attacking Iranian air defense, ground control stations and surveillance radar sites near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claims it returned fired with 21 attacks against U.S. military targets across the Middle East. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US Strikes Iran in Retaliation of Downed Apache Helicopter
media:content.media:description: The United States announced it retaliated to Iran’s downing of a U.S. Army Apache helicopter by attacking Iranian air defense, ground control stations and surveillance radar sites near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claims it returned fired with 21 attacks against U.S. military targets across the Middle East. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: US Strikes Iran in Retaliation of Downed Apache Helicopter

item.description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.

media:content.media:title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.

item.title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica

item.description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner is poised to win a primary election tonight as he’s facing a series of scandals. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

media:content.media:title: Key test for Democrats in Maine
media:content.media:description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner is poised to win a primary election tonight as he’s facing a series of scandals. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

item.title: Key test for Democrats in Maine

item.description: U.K. leaders are calling for calm after a night of violence erupted across Northern Ireland where hundreds of anti-immigration protesters took to the streets of Belfast torching homes and vehicles. It comes after the arrest of a Sudanese man accused in a brutal knife attack that left one man with serious injuries.

media:content.media:title: Violent Anti-Immigration Protests Erupt Across Northern Ireland
media:content.media:description: U.K. leaders are calling for calm after a night of violence erupted across Northern Ireland where hundreds of anti-immigration protesters took to the streets of Belfast torching homes and vehicles. It comes after the arrest of a Sudanese man accused in a brutal knife attack that left one man with serious injuries.

item.title: Violent Anti-Immigration Protests Erupt Across Northern Ireland

item.description: In our series 'The Cost of Denial' NBC News’ Kate Snow meets with the parents who decided to keep their daughter in a specialized mental health care facility despite knowing it didn’t take insurance. They hoped they’d work out a deal for coverage but now find themselves more than a million dollars in debt. They believed that without the treatment, their daughter would die.

media:content.media:title: A family’s desperate choice: the massive debt to save their daughter
media:content.media:description: In our series 'The Cost of Denial' NBC News’ Kate Snow meets with the parents who decided to keep their daughter in a specialized mental health care facility despite knowing it didn’t take insurance. They hoped they’d work out a deal for coverage but now find themselves more than a million dollars in debt. They believed that without the treatment, their daughter would die.

item.title: A family’s desperate choice: the massive debt to save their daughter

item.dc:creator: Rich Schapiro
item.description: David Rush’s former firefighter colleagues looked up to him as an ace pilot. Now they wonder whether he was making it all up “like Leonardo DiCaprio in ‘Catch Me If You Can.’”

media:content.media:text: A sketch of David Rush sitting in court, side profile
media:content.media:description: Former CIA Officer David Rush in court Friday.

media:content.media:text: David Rush during his time at the Ashburn Volunteer Fire and Rescue Department.
media:content.media:description: Former CIA Officer David Rush in court Friday.

item.title: Before arrest with 303 gold bars, CIA officer spun tale he was Top Gun fighter pilot

item.description: From perennial powerhouses in Europe and South America to underdogs from around the globe, many of soccer’s very best are converging on the United States for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. NBC’s Jesse Kirsch reports for TODAY with the top players to watch.

media:content.media:title: Here Are the Top Players to Watch in the 2026 FIFA World Cup
media:content.media:description: From perennial powerhouses in Europe and South America to underdogs from around the globe, many of soccer’s very best are converging on the United States for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. NBC’s Jesse Kirsch reports for TODAY with the top players to watch.

item.title: Here Are the Top Players to Watch in the 2026 FIFA World Cup

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
Abigail Williams
item.description: Somalia is not competing at the World Cup, but from the scenes at Mogadishu’s airport Wednesday, you’d think the country had won the trophy.

media:content.media:text: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Aymen Hussein of Iraq reacts during a match against Bolivia on March 31, 2026 in Guadalupe, Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Aymen Hussein of Iraq reacts during a match against Bolivia on March 31 in Guadalupe, Mexico.

item.title: Referee barred from entering U.S. for World Cup receives a hero’s welcome in Somalia

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Unite Here Local 11, which represents nearly 2,000 cooks, dishwashers, bartenders and concession workers at SoFi Stadium, voted just last week to authorize a strike.

media:content.media:text: SoFi Stadium workers arrive at union headquarters
media:content.media:description: SoFi Stadium workers arrive at union headquarters in Inglewood, Calif., for a strike vote Thursday.

item.title: Workers at L.A.-area World Cup stadium reach tentative agreement after authorizing strike

item.description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.

media:content.media:title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.

item.title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: Forget trying to predict the Stanley Cup Final.

media:content.media:text: Jordan Staal of the Carolina Hurricanes scores a goal against Colton Sissons of the Vegas Golden Knights in the third period of game four of the Stanley Cup Finals on June 9, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Jordan Staal of the Carolina Hurricanes scores a goal Tuesday against Colton Sissons of the Vegas Golden Knights in the third period of game four of the Stanley Cup Finals.

media:content.media:text: Brandon Bussi of the Carolina Hurricanes makes a save against the Vegas Golden Knights
media:content.media:description: Jordan Staal of the Carolina Hurricanes scores a goal Tuesday against Colton Sissons of the Vegas Golden Knights in the third period of game four of the Stanley Cup Finals.

media:content.media:text: Valverde Federico of Uruguay controls the ball during a friendly match against Algeria on March 31, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Jordan Staal of the Carolina Hurricanes scores a goal Tuesday against Colton Sissons of the Vegas Golden Knights in the third period of game four of the Stanley Cup Finals.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Carolina claims Game 4 in back-and-forth Stanley Cup Final

item.dc:creator: Lindsay Good
David K. Li
item.description: A mother and two children got caught in powerful ocean swells off the Southern California coast before witnesses jumped into the water to save two of the swimmers on Tuesday night — with one child still missing, officials said.

media:content.media:text: An Orange County Sheriff’s Department patrol boat on June 10, 2026.
media:content.media:description: An Orange County Sheriff’s Department patrol boat on Wednesday.

item.title: Girl swept away and still missing off the Southern California coast

item.dc:creator: Gordon Lubold
Courtney Kube
Carol E. Lee
item.description: Defense industry leaders have been preparing to meet with President Donald Trump at the White House later this week over missiles.

media:content.media:text: Trump Signs Order Directing Customs Crackdown Amid Trade Gaps
media:content.media:description: Donald Trump in the Oval Office of the White House on June 3.

media:content.media:text: An image shared on X by CENTCOM alongside a post about the U.S. completing strikes in response to Iran’s attack on apache.
media:content.media:description: Donald Trump in the Oval Office of the White House on June 3.

item.title: Defense industry leaders preparing to meet with Trump as worries grow over missile supply, sources say

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: Stephanie Gosk will answer your questions about the 2026 World Cup live on Thursday, June 11, at 12 p.m. ET from Mexico City ahead of Mexico vs. South Africa.

media:content.media:text: TODAY -- Pictured: Stephanie Gosk on Monday, June 10, 2024
media:content.media:description: Stephanie Gosk.

media:content.media:text: South Africa vs Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Stephanie Gosk.

item.title: Stephanie Gosk answers your questions about the World Cup and more

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Ohio police are searching for a 20-year-old suspect and a “second shooter” in connection with a Saturday shooting at a neighborhood festival in Toledo that wounded 12 people

media:content.media:text: Law enforcement.
media:content.media:description: Police investigate where multiple people were shot at a community festival on June 6 in Toledo, Ohio.

media:content.media:text: Ka Nye Taylor.
media:content.media:description: Police investigate where multiple people were shot at a community festival on June 6 in Toledo, Ohio.

media:content.media:text: Suspect.
media:content.media:description: Police investigate where multiple people were shot at a community festival on June 6 in Toledo, Ohio.

item.title: Police identify suspect in Ohio festival shooting that wounded 12

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: Retired wrestler Tyler Mane, known for his role in the X-Men franchise, revealed Tuesday that he had been diagnosed with breast cancer.

media:content.media:text: Tyler Mane
media:content.media:description: Tyler Mane attends the "Deadpool & Wolverine" New York City premiere in 2024.

item.title: X-Men actor Tyler Mane says he was diagnosed with breast cancer and urges men to get checked

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
Abigail Williams
item.description: Somalia is not competing at the World Cup, but from the scenes at Mogadishu’s airport Wednesday, you’d think the country had won the trophy.

media:content.media:text: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Aymen Hussein of Iraq reacts during a match against Bolivia on March 31, 2026 in Guadalupe, Mexico.

item.title: Referee barred from entering U.S. for World Cup receives a hero’s welcome in Somalia

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Austin Mullen
item.description: Oscar-winning director Martin Scorsese, usually hailed as a master filmmaker and scholar of cinema, is facing backlash for promoting a company that offers generative AI products.

media:content.media:text: Martin Scorsese.
media:content.media:description: Martin Scorsese on June 5 in New York City.

item.title: Martin Scorsese’s promotion of AI company called a ‘betrayal’ by director’s union

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Brad Lander is set to stand trial in a federal courthouse in the city starting Wednesday over an arrest in September that occurred while the then-New York City comptroller was protesting conditions at an immigration holding facility.

media:content.media:text: New York City Comptroller Brad Lander
media:content.media:description: Brad Lander is placed under arrest by Immigration and Customs Enforcement and FBI agents outside federal immigration court in New York in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: US Congressional Candidate Brad Lander Court Hearing Over ICE Charges
media:content.media:description: Brad Lander is placed under arrest by Immigration and Customs Enforcement and FBI agents outside federal immigration court in New York in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: NYC Comptroller Brad Lander
media:content.media:description: Brad Lander is placed under arrest by Immigration and Customs Enforcement and FBI agents outside federal immigration court in New York in June 2025.

item.title: Brad Lander stands trial in New York over September arrest at ICE facility

item.dc:creator: Chloe Atkins
Tom Winter
Jonathan Dienst
item.description: NBA journeyman Terry Rozier pleaded not guilty Wednesday to new charges of sports bribery and honest services wire fraud conspiracy, stemming from his alleged role in a sprawling sports betting scheme.

media:content.media:text: Terry Rozier leaves with his lawyers after his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier leaves after his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.

media:content.media:text: Terry Rozier with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier leaves after his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.

media:content.media:text: De'niro Laster and his lawyer arrive for his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier leaves after his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.

media:content.media:text: Portland Trail Blazers head coach Chauncey Billups on Oct. 8, 2025.
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier leaves after his arraignment hearing at Brooklyn Federal Court on Dec. 8, 2025 in New York.

item.title: Ex-NBA player Terry Rozier pleads not guilty to new charges in alleged gambling scheme

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: The owner of a foot fetish company was arrested in New York City on Monday in connection with sex trafficking charges

media:content.media:text: An FBI agent at a crime scene.
media:content.media:description: An FBI agent at a crime scene.

item.title: Foot fetish company owner arrested on sex trafficking charges, accused of rape

item.dc:creator: Claudio Lavanga
Molly Hunter
item.description: Pope Leo XIV offered his formal blessing to the highest spire of the world’s tallest church, when he holds Mass at the Sagrada Família in Barcelona.

media:content.media:text: Pope Leo XIV visits Spain
media:content.media:description: Pope Leo XIV rides in the popemobile ahead of the Mass at the Basilica of the Sagrada Familia on June 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Pope Leo XIV leads a Mass in the Basilica of the Sagrada Familia on June 10, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Pope Leo XIV leads the Mass.

media:content.media:text: Spain Pope
media:content.media:description: Spain's King Felipe VI and Queen Letizia wait for the start of the Mass.

media:content.media:text: Spain Pope
media:content.media:description: Prelates wait for the start of the Mass.

media:content.media:text: Spain Pope
media:content.media:description: Faithful wait for the start of the Mass.

media:content.media:text: A view of the cross crowning the Tower of Jesus Christ at the Sagrada Familia basilica in Barcelona, Spain.
media:content.media:description: The cross crowning the Sagrada Família's Tower of Jesus Christ.

media:content.media:text: Pope Leo XIV Visits Spain
media:content.media:description: Antoni Gaudí's Basilica of the Sagrada Família.

item.title: Pope Leo blesses Barcelona’s towering architectural masterpiece

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
Doha Madani
Tim Rohan
Rohan Nadkarni
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Spain’s Lamine Yamal is just 18 years old — and already among the best players in the sport. Here’s the full list of future stars to watch.

media:content.media:text: Lamine Yamal smiles and points to the icon for Spain on his soccer jersey in front of a red colored background
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Lamine Yamal jumps and yells in celebration on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Jude Bellingham runs while controlling the ball on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland runs on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Weston McKennie runs while controlling the soccer ball on the field
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Vinicius Junior bites his winners medal on the soccer field and holds up two fists in celebration
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Jamal Musiala, right, jumps high while aiming to kick a ball on the soccer field next to other players
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

media:content.media:text: Alphonso Davies of Canada controls the ball during a match against Mexico on March 20, 2025 in Inglewood, Calif.
media:content.media:description: Lamine Yamal of Spain.

item.title: From Spanish wonderkid to Norwegian goal machine: The next generation of World Cup stars
